messages.subject: Video inside: Virtual Hotel Concierge
messages.body:
Hi The Centurion Hotel,

Hotels using Viqal's Hospitality AI Assistants automate guest communication on WhatsApp — saving hours every day and boosting upsell revenue. Here is a short 10-minute demo that shows exactly how it works:

okay

messages.subject: Kleinkaap Overflow Rooms 23 April
messages.body:
Hi There,

Can you assist with a quotation for 20 single rooms check in 23 April and check out 24 April?
B&B?

Where your story becomes ours,

Riani Steyn
Events & Banqueting Manager

messages.subject: Re: Kleinkaap Overflow Rooms 23 April
messages.body:
Dear Riani,

Thank you for considering The Centurion for Kleinkaap’s overflow on 23–24 April.

We are pleased to advise provisional availability for twenty (20) single rooms on a bed-and-breakfast basis, subject to final release within forty-eight (48) hours of your written confirmation.

Indicative group rate (per room, per night, single occupancy, B&B): ZAR 2,485.00 (excl. VAT)
Room subtotal (20 rooms × 1 night): ZAR 49,700.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 7,455.00
Indicative total: ZAR 57,155.00

Figures are indicative only, subject to availability and may change without notice. This quotation remains valid for 48 hours.

Should you require banquet or meeting space, our Events team will gladly prepare a separate proposal tailored to your programme.

Warm regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: Urgent Tax invoice
messages.body:
Good day,

Please assist with an urgent tax invoice for our guest file. Importance: High.

Kind regards,
Leelyn Govington

messages.subject: RE: Urgent Tax invoice
messages.body:
Dear Mr. Mahlangu,

Kindly see the details below and assist with the invoice at your earliest convenience.

Kind Regards,

Martha Mthembu
Senior Front Office Manager

messages.subject: Re: Urgent Tax invoice
messages.body:
Dear Ms Govington,

Thank you for your email regarding the urgent tax invoice.

We have escalated your request to our finance office and anticipate issuing the formal tax invoice within twenty-four (24) business hours, provided the correct folio or reservation reference is on file.

Should we require any additional detail, a colleague will contact you without delay.

Kind regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: booking
messages.body:
Good day

I hope this email finds you well,
Kindly assist with making a booking for the following (government rates)(DBB)
Check in: 08 April 2026
Check out: 10 April 2026
Department: Musina Local municipality

Guest name: Takalani Rambuda

Kindly address the invoice to:
Besty Travel
26A Makhado street
Mankweng, 0727
VAT No: 4020243921

messages.subject: Re: booking
messages.body:
Good day,

Thank you for your booking request for Ms Takalani Rambuda, check-in 8 April and check-out 10 April 2026, on government dinner, bed and breakfast terms.

We are pleased to confirm provisional availability for one (1) guest room, pending verification of government credentials at check-in.

Indicative rate (DBB, government, single occupancy): ZAR 2,195.00 per night (excl. VAT)
Two (2) nights: ZAR 4,390.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 658.50
Indicative total: ZAR 5,048.50

Invoicing will be addressed to Besty Travel with VAT number 4020243921 as specified. Amounts are indicative, subject to availability, and this offer remains valid for 48 hours.

With warm regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: RE 4 ROOMS CHECK IN THE 09 APR AND OUT THE 10APR
messages.body:
Dear Reservations

Please confirm 4 room check in the 09 April and out the 10 April for government SADTU DBB

Names of guest

1. MAIPATO MORAKE
2. TOBJA MONYAI
3. NONZALISEKO MZIZI
4. ZAKHELE MAHLALELA

PLEASE NOTE
All pricing is valid for day of quotation only. Prices are subject to change based on availability and exchange rate.
PLEASE MAKE SURE WHEN CONFIRMING BOOKINGS NAME AND SURNAME IS AS PER ID OR PASSPORT

Kind Regards

NAFISA WADIWALA | Travel Consultant

messages.subject: Re: RE 4 ROOMS CHECK IN THE 09 APR AND OUT THE 10APR
messages.body:
Dear Nafisa,

Thank you for your request to confirm four (4) rooms for 9–10 April 2026 on SADTU government DBB terms.

Subject to final availability, we are pleased to hold the following indicative quotation:

Per room, per night (DBB, government): ZAR 2,145.00 (excl. VAT)
Four (4) rooms × one (1) night: ZAR 8,580.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 1,287.00
Indicative total: ZAR 9,867.00

Please confirm that each guest name will be captured exactly as per ID or passport at check-in, per your note.

Rates are indicative, subject to availability, and valid for 48 hours.

Kind regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: Request for a quotation
messages.body:
Good day Sir/Mam

Kindly send me a quotation and invoice for accommodation for the below dates :

Accommodation: Bed, Breakfast and Dinner for 1 person (Government rate)
Check in: 17/05/2026 and Check out: 22/05/2026

Ntswaki Morake
HR Practitioner

messages.subject: Re: Request for a quotation
messages.body:
Good day Ms Morake,

Thank you for your request for a quotation and invoice for dinner, bed and breakfast on government terms, 17–22 May 2026 (five nights), one guest.

Indicative rate (DBB, government, single): ZAR 2,265.00 per night (excl. VAT)
Five (5) nights: ZAR 11,325.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 1,698.75
Indicative total: ZAR 13,023.75

A formal PDF quotation may be issued upon your written acceptance. All amounts are indicative, subject to availability, and this structure is valid for 48 hours.

Kind regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: TRAVEL INFORMATION
messages.body:
Dear Legacy Hotel Team,

Please find below my travel information:

Reference: AFDB0413
Name: EVA
Surname: RUGANZU
Email Address: e.ruganzu@afdb.org
Contact Number: +254 713 679 841
Check-In Date: 11 April 2026
Check-Out Date: 19 April 2026
Transfer from OR Tambo
  Date of arrival: 11 April 2026
  Time of arrival: 15:50
  Flight No: KQ 762
Transfer to OR Tambo
  Date of departure: 19 April 2026
  Time of departure: 12:10
  Flight No: KQ 761
Daily Transfer to and from Hotel: Yes/No

Thank you,

Eva RUGANZU | REGIONAL MANAGER

messages.subject: Re: TRAVEL INFORMATION
messages.body:
Dear Ms Ruganzu,

Thank you for sharing your travel information for reference AFDB0413.

We have pleasure in pre-registering your stay from 11–19 April 2026 and note your arrival on KQ 762 and departure on KQ 761 as advised.

Indicative guest room (deluxe category): ZAR 3,850.00 per night (excl. VAT)
Eight (8) nights: ZAR 30,800.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 4,620.00
Indicative room total: ZAR 35,420.00

Private transfer — OR Tambo (per direction, sedan, indicative): ZAR 1,250.00 (excl. VAT)
Return pair (excl. VAT): ZAR 2,500.00 | VAT (15%): ZAR 375.00 | Indicative ZAR 2,875.00

Please confirm whether daily hotel transfers are required (your form indicated Yes/No) so our concierge may finalise the manifest.

All figures are indicative, subject to availability, and valid for 48 hours.

With compliments,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel

messages.subject: REQUEST FOR QUOTATION
messages.body:
Good day

Please assist me with a quote for the below

02PAX
Check in: 09 April 2026
Check out: 10 April 2026
DBB WITH 2 SOFT DRINKS
STANDARD ROOMS
Government Rate
Dept of Transport

--
Melvin Makwela
Travel Consultant

messages.subject: Re: REQUEST FOR QUOTATION
messages.body:
Good day Melvin,

Thank you for your quotation request for two (2) guests, 9–10 April 2026, standard accommodation, DBB with soft drinks as per your programme, on government terms for the Department of Transport.

We are pleased to advise provisional availability, subject to verification of credentials at check-in.

Indicative rate (standard, DBB with house soft-drink allocation on programme, government, double): ZAR 2,320.00 per room per night (excl. VAT)
One (1) night, one (1) room (2 pax): ZAR 2,320.00
VAT (15%): ZAR 348.00
Indicative total: ZAR 2,668.00

Invoicing may reference the Department of Transport as instructed. Amounts are indicative, subject to availability, and this offer is valid for 48 hours.

Kind regards,
Reservations
The Centurion — A Legacy Hotel
